title: VerbTeX Network Protocol (VNP) Packet Schema
description: Defines the structure and validation rules for all VNP packet headers embedded in .tex or .pdf documents.

from.description: Originating sender or source node address.

role.description: Functional designation of the node (e.g., Echo-Maintainer, Reviewer, Processor).

task_id.description: Unique request identifier in the form YYYY-MM-DD-###.

checksum.description: SHA-256 hash of document body for integrity validation.

intent.description: Human-readable statement describing purpose or action.
